title: colysis irioides
intro: Colysis irioides, also known as the Golden Rattle Fern or the Colysis fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. Research has shown that Colysis irioides has various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The plant is traditionally prepared as an herbal remedy, typically in the form of a tea or infusion, by steeping the leaves in hot water.
